Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Man, it's exhausting dealing with two of 'em at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The two claiming to be "Strega" did not interfere this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's probably because we have their navigator. They can't outmaneuver us now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Still, Aragaki-senpai never showed, huh? Amada-kun, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}The chairman doesn't seem to be too concerned. He's already headed home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Yamagishi, do you know where they are?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Sorry, I haven't been able to locate them yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Let's return to the dorm for the time being.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Go on back without me. I'm gonna go look for them.[n]{f 1 1}
